heading: Restriction on discharge from employment by reason of garnishment
label: 1674 Restriction on discharge from employment by reason of garnishment

children.heading: Termination of employment
children.label: a Termination of employment
children.text: No employer may discharge any employee by reason of the fact that his earnings have been subjected to garnishment for any one indebtedness.

children.heading: Penalties
children.label: b Penalties
children.text: Whoever willfully violates subsection (a) of this section shall be fined not more than $1,000, or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
